import yaml

def process_configs(payloads: list[str]) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    for payload in payloads:
        config = yaml.safe_load(payload)
        results.append(config)
    return results

def merge_yaml_files(paths: list[str]) -> dict:
    merged = {}
    for path in paths:
        with open(path) as f:
            data = yaml.safe_load(f.read())
        merged.update(data)
    return merged

def validate_schemas(yaml_payloads: list[str]) -> list[bool]:
    results = []
    for payload in yaml_payloads:
        parsed = yaml.safe_load(payload)
        valid = "name" in parsed and "version" in parsed
        results.append(valid)
    return results

def transform_yaml_configs(raw_payloads: list[str]) -> list[dict]:
    transformed = []
    for raw in raw_payloads:
        config = yaml.safe_load(raw)
        config["processed"] = True
        transformed.append(config)
    return transformed
